__fixture_tag__: VENDORED SOURCE SNAPSHOT — peer-reviewed lab data, frozen

claim.material: Carbon nanotube macroscopic yarn (densified DWNT, lab-mm scale)
claim.condition: single yarn, sub-mm gauge length, lab-scale measurement

source.primary: Bai et al. 2018 Nature Nanotechnol. 13, 589 (Tsinghua) — DWNT bundle sigma_t = 80 GPa
source.secondary: Behabtu et al. 2013 Science 339, 182 (Rice + Teijin); IBS Korea CNT-yarn studies
source.citation: Bai 2018 Nat. Nanotechnol. 13, 589 (Tsinghua) — CNT macroscopic yarn sigma_t ~ 80 GPa at lab-mm gauge

tolerance.basis: lab-to-lab and sample-to-sample variance ~ 10-15% on densified DWNT bundles

spec_doc.line_hint: CNT yarn 80 GPa lab-mm-scale UNPROVEN row

unproven_reason: lab-mm gauge only; commercial CNT yarn at km scale remains 1-3 GPa (40-80x gap); NOT reproduced at commodity yarn scale
